#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[2m'    # dim
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$DIM"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
# Pad model name to fixed width based on "Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M)"
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(' ' * pad + text, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[2m'    # dim
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${WHITE}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
# Pad model name to fixed width based on "Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M)"
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(' ' * pad + text, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

message.content: １行目のブランチ名の後ろに（変更ファイル数、追加行数、削除行数）を表示することはできますか？

content.text:
できます。`git diff` と `git status` で取得できます。

```bash
# 変更ファイル数
git status --porcelain | wc -l

# 追加行数・削除行数
git diff --numstat HEAD | awk '{added+=$1; deleted+=$2} END {print added, deleted}'
```

表示形式はどうしたいですか？例えば：
- `(2 files, +10, -5)`
- `2f +10 -5`
- `+10 -5`

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

lines: +  additions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
+  deletions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum}')

  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;

esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output

[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats (changed files, additions, deletions)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  changed_files=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  additions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
  deletions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum}')

  if [ "$changed_files" -gt 0 ] || [ -n "$additions" ] || [ -n "$deletions" ]; then
    git_stats=""
    git_stats="${DIM}(${RESET}${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}"
    [ -n "$additions" ] && [ "$additions" -gt 0 ] && git_stats="${git_stats} ${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}"
    [ -n "$deletions" ] && [ "$deletions" -gt 0 ] && git_stats="${git_stats} ${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}"
    git_stats="${git_stats}${DIM})${RESET}"
    location="${location}  ${git_stats}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

message.content: これってコミット前の変更だけだよね？例えまベースブランチからの差分って表示できるかな（ベースブランチって特定できる？）

content.text:
はい、現在は `git diff HEAD` なのでコミット前の変更のみです。

ベースブランチの特定方法はいくつかあります：

1. **upstream トラッキングブランチ**（最も確実）
   ```bash
   git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream}
   # → origin/main など
   ```

2. **フォールバック**：upstream がなければ `main` / `master` を試す

3. `git merge-base HEAD <base>` でブランチが分岐した点からの差分を計算

表示内容も変わります：
- 現在：コミット前の変更ファイル数・行数
- 変更後：ベースブランチからのコミット済み変更も含む累積差分

やってみますか？

hookInfos.command: say "Claude Code の処理が完了しました"

message.content: どっちも表示して 1,3 で

content.text:
「1,3で」は行1と行3に表示という意味ですね。

- **行1**：コミット前の変更（現在の表示）
- **行3**：ベースブランチからの差分（リミット情報と同じ行に追加）

方法1（upstream）でベースブランチを特定し、方法3（merge-base）で差分を計算します。

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats (changed files, additions, deletions)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  changed_files=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  additions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
  deletions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum}')

  if [ "$changed_files" -gt 0 ] || [ -n "$additions" ] || [ -n "$deletions" ]; then
    git_stats=""
    git_stats="${DIM}(${RESET}${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}${DIM})${RESET}"
    location="${location}  ${git_stats}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

lines: -  additions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
-  deletions=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum}')
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')

input.old_string:
# --- Line 3: limit info ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"
input.new_string:
# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"
[ -n "$base_diff_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$base_diff_str"

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats: uncommitted changes (line 1)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  _numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  changed_files=$(echo "$_numstat" | grep -c .)
  additions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
  deletions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')

  if [ "$changed_files" -gt 0 ] || [ "$additions" -gt 0 ] || [ "$deletions" -gt 0 ]; then
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}${DIM})${RESET}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# Git stats: base branch diff (line 3)
base_diff_str=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -n "$branch" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch="main"

  merge_base=$(git -C "$cwd" merge-base HEAD "origin/${base_branch}" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$merge_base" ]; then
    _base_numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat "$merge_base" HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    base_files=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | grep -c .)
    base_add=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
    base_del=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')

    if [ "$base_files" -gt 0 ] || [ "$base_add" -gt 0 ] || [ "$base_del" -gt 0 ]; then
      base_diff_str="${DIM}from ${base_branch}: (${RESET}${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${base_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${base_add}${RESET}${RED}-${base_del}${RESET}${DIM})${RESET}"
    fi
  fi
fi

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"
[ -n "$base_diff_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$base_diff_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

lines: +# Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  # Uncommitted changes
  _numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  changed_files=$(echo "$_numstat" | grep -c .)
  additions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
  deletions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
  uncommitted_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}"

  # Base branch diff
  base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch="main"
  merge_base=$(git -C "$cwd" merge-base HEAD "origin/${base_branch}" 2>/dev/null)
  base_str=""
  if [ -n "$merge_base" ]; then
    _base_numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat "$merge_base" HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    base_files=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | grep -c .)
    base_add=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
    base_del=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
    base_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${base_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${base_add}${RESET}${RED}-${base_del}${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ -n "$base_str" ]; then
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${base_str}${DIM} / ${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  else
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"
[ -n "$base_diff_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$base_diff_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

message.content: main がメインブラインチだけどどこの設定を見てメインブランチとしているの？

content.text:
スクリプトは以下の順で判定しています：

1. **現在のブランチの upstream トラッキングブランチ**
   ```bash
   git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream}
   ```

2. **`origin/HEAD`（リモートのデフォルトブランチ）**
   ```bash
   git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD
   ```

3. **フォールバック：ハードコードの `main`**

このリポジトリでは `origin/HEAD → origin/entire/checkpoints/v1` なので、2番で `entire/checkpoints/v1` が取得できるはずですが、1番の `@{upstream}` がリテラルで返っていて空判定が正しく動いていない可能性があります。確認してみます。

hookInfos.command: say "Claude Code の処理が完了しました"
entire hooks claude-code stop

message.content: main に変更したいんだけどどうやって git の設定を変えればいい？

content.text:
`origin/HEAD` を変更するには：

```bash
git remote set-head origin main
```

または現在のブランチの upstream を設定するには：

```bash
git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/main
```

ただし `origin/main` ブランチが存在しない場合は失敗します。このリポジトリのメインブランチは `entire/checkpoints/v1` なので、スクリプト側でハードコードする方が確実かもしれません。

どちらがよいですか？

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  # Uncommitted changes
  _numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  changed_files=$(echo "$_numstat" | grep -c .)
  additions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
  deletions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
  uncommitted_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}"

  # Base branch diff
  base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch="main"
  merge_base=$(git -C "$cwd" merge-base HEAD "origin/${base_branch}" 2>/dev/null)
  base_str=""
  if [ -n "$merge_base" ]; then
    _base_numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat "$merge_base" HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    base_files=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | grep -c .)
    base_add=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
    base_del=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
    base_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${base_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${base_add}${RESET}${RED}-${base_del}${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ -n "$base_str" ]; then
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${base_str}${DIM} / ${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  else
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

#!/bin/bash
# Claude Code status line script

input=$(cat)

# ANSI colors
CYAN=$'\033[36m'
GREEN=$'\033[92m'
YELLOW=$'\033[33m'
RED=$'\033[31m'
BLUE=$'\033[34m'
MAGENTA=$'\033[35m'
DIM=$'\033[2m'
WHITE=$'\033[97m'
RESET=$'\033[0m'

# Nerd Font icons via python3 (ensures correct UTF-8 encoding)
_icon() { python3 -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write(chr($1).encode('utf-8'))"; }
ICON_FOLDER=$(_icon 0xf07b)   # nf-fa-folder
ICON_BRANCH=$(_icon 0xF062C)  # nf-pl-branch
ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  # Uncommitted changes
  _numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  changed_files=$(echo "$_numstat" | grep -c .)
  additions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
  deletions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
  uncommitted_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}"

  # Base branch diff
  base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch="main"
  merge_base=$(git -C "$cwd" merge-base HEAD "origin/${base_branch}" 2>/dev/null)
  base_str=""
  if [ -n "$merge_base" ]; then
    _base_numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat "$merge_base" HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    base_files=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | grep -c .)
    base_add=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
    base_del=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
    total=$(( base_add + base_del ))
    if   (( total > 800 )); then pr_size="XL"
    elif (( total > 400 )); then pr_size="L"
    elif (( total > 200 )); then pr_size="M"
    else                         pr_size="S"
    fi
    base_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${base_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${base_add}${RESET}${RED}-${base_del}${RESET} ${DIM}${pr_size}${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ -n "$base_str" ]; then
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${base_str}${DIM} / ${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  else
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

lines: +    if   (( total > 800 )); then pr_size="XL"; pr_color=$'\033[91m'  # bright red

ICON_ROBOT=$(_icon 0xF06A9)   # nf-fa-brain (model)
ICON_CTX=$(_icon 0xf4bc)      # nf-fa-microchip (context)
ICON_CLOCK=$(_icon 0xf017)    # nf-fa-clock_o (5h limit)
ICON_CAL=$(_icon 0xf073)      # nf-fa-calendar (7d limit)
ICON_FILES=$(_icon 0xeafb)    # file-code-nf
ICON_PLUS=$(_icon 0xf067)     # fa-plus-nf
ICON_MINUS=$(_icon 0xf068)    # fa-minus-nf

# Current directory (basename)
cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // ""')
dir=$(basename "$cwd")

# Git branch (skip optional locks)
branch=""
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  branch=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
fi

# PR number from branch name (extract leading digits, e.g. "123-fix-bug" -> "#123")
pr_num=""
if [ -n "$branch" ]; then
  pr_num=$(echo "$branch" | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1)
  [ -n "$pr_num" ] && pr_num=" #${pr_num}"
fi

# Model name
model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // ""')

# Context usage progress bar (color based on usage)
remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty')
context_str=""
if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then
  context_str=$(python3 -c "
used = 100 - $remaining
bar_len = 10
filled = round(used * bar_len / 100)
bar = '\u2588' * filled + '\u2591' * (bar_len - filled)
if used >= 80:
    color = '\x1b[31m'   # red
elif used >= 50:
    color = '\x1b[33m'   # yellow
else:
    color = '\x1b[97m'   # white
reset = '\x1b[0m'
print(f'{color}{bar} {used:.0f}%{reset}', end='')
")
fi

# Helper: usage color
_usage_color() {
  local pct=${1%.*}  # truncate to integer
  if (( pct >= 80 )); then printf '%s' "$RED"
  elif (( pct >= 50 )); then printf '%s' "$YELLOW"
  else printf '%s' "$WHITE"
  fi
}

# Session (5-hour) cost limit
five_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty')
five_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty')
session_str=""
if [ -n "$five_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$five_pct")
  reset_time=""
  [ -n "$five_reset" ] && reset_time=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($five_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_time" ]; then
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_time}${RESET}"
  else
    session_str="${ICON_CLOCK} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$five_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# Weekly (7-day) cost limit
week_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty')
week_reset=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty')
week_str=""
if [ -n "$week_pct" ]; then
  col=$(_usage_color "$week_pct")
  reset_date=""
  [ -n "$week_reset" ] && reset_date=$(python3 -c "import datetime; jst=datetime.timezone(datetime.timedelta(hours=9)); print(datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp($week_reset, tz=jst).strftime('%m/%d %H:%M'))")
  if [ -n "$reset_date" ]; then
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET} ${DIM}by ${reset_date}${RESET}"
  else
    week_str="${ICON_CAL} ${col}$(printf "%.0f%%" "$week_pct")${RESET}"
  fi
fi

# --- Line 1: location info ---
location="${CYAN}${ICON_FOLDER} ${dir}${RESET}"
[ -n "$branch" ] && location="${location}  ${GREEN}${ICON_BRANCH} ${branch}${RESET}"
[ -n "$pr_num" ] && location="${location} ${DIM}(${pr_num})${RESET}"

# Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)
if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  # Uncommitted changes
  _numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  changed_files=$(echo "$_numstat" | grep -c .)
  additions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
  deletions=$(echo "$_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
  uncommitted_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${changed_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${additions}${RESET}${RED}-${deletions}${RESET}"

  # Base branch diff
  base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null | sed 's|origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||')
  [ -z "$base_branch" ] && base_branch="main"
  merge_base=$(git -C "$cwd" merge-base HEAD "origin/${base_branch}" 2>/dev/null)
  base_str=""
  if [ -n "$merge_base" ]; then
    _base_numstat=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --numstat "$merge_base" HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    base_files=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | grep -c .)
    base_add=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum+0}')
    base_del=$(echo "$_base_numstat" | awk '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
    total=$(( base_add + base_del ))
    if   (( total > 800 )); then pr_size="XL"; pr_color=$'\033[91m'  # bright red
    elif (( total > 400 )); then pr_size="L";  pr_color="$RED"
    elif (( total > 200 )); then pr_size="M";  pr_color="$YELLOW"
    else                         pr_size="S";  pr_color="$WHITE"
    fi
    base_str="${BLUE}${ICON_FILES}${base_files}${RESET}${GREEN}+${base_add}${RESET}${RED}-${base_del}${RESET} ${pr_color}${pr_size}${RESET}"
  fi

  if [ -n "$base_str" ]; then
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${base_str}${DIM} / ${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  else
    location="${location}  ${DIM}(${RESET}${uncommitted_str}${DIM})${RESET}"
  fi
fi
line1="$location"

# --- Line 2: AI info ---
model=$(echo "$model" | sed 's/ context)//g; s/)//g; s/(//g; s/ [0-9]*\.[0-9]*//g')
case "$model" in
  *Opus*)   model_color="$YELLOW" ;;
  *Haiku*)  model_color="$RED" ;;
  *)        model_color=$'\033[97m' ;;  # Sonnet and others (white)
esac
model=$(echo "$model" | sed "s/\([0-9]*[kKmMbB]\)/${RESET}${RED}\1${RESET}${model_color}/g")
model_padded=$(python3 -c "
import re
text = '$model'
visible = re.sub(r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '', text)
target = len('Sonnet 1M')
pad = max(0, target - len(visible))
print(text + ' ' * pad, end='')
")
line2="${model_color}${ICON_ROBOT} ${model_padded}${RESET}"
[ -n "$context_str" ] && line2="${line2}  ${context_str}"

# --- Line 3: limit info + base branch diff ---
line3=""
[ -n "$session_str" ] && line3="$session_str"
[ -n "$week_str" ] && line3="${line3:+$line3  }$week_str"

# Output
output="$line1"
[ -n "$line2" ] && output="$output\n$line2"
[ -n "$line3" ] && output="$output\n$line3"
printf "%b" "$output"

lines: # Git stats: base branch diff + uncommitted changes (line 1)

content.text: 白に変更しました。

hookInfos.command: say "Claude Code の処理が完了しました"
entire hooks claude-code stop

lastPrompt: ブランチ名とフォルダ名は白で
